title: MOBILE CRISIS TEAM - 211info
text: BENTON COUNTY CRISIS CENTER MOBILE CRISIS TEAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assesses individuals in the community through a mobile crisis team upon request from various community partners, including law enforcement. 240 NW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Individuals who are experiencing a mental health crisis Hours: 24 hours per day/ 7 days per week Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Community members can call their local police non-emergency line to access this service. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: In Person Crisis Intervention Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - DROP-IN COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON COUNTY CRISIS CENTER
